Need help finding a product or solution? Try Ask Microsoft.
What is the value of M365 Copilot in Teams?
What are the key benefits of Teams?
FEATURED NEWS
Discover what’s happening with Teams
Pride is alive: new Teams backgrounds
This year, Pride isn’t just about showing up. It’s about choosing to live—openly, visibly, and fully. Show your support with new Pride backgrounds.
Download the backgrounds
From Threads to Workflows: Microsoft Teams Features That Boost Everyone’s Productivity
Organizations want to work faster and smarter. Guided by customer feedback, Microsoft Teams is adding new features like threads, multiple emoji reactions, and emoji-triggered workflows.
Learn more
Gartner® Magic Quadrant™
Microsoft was named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Unified Communications as a Service for the seventh year in a row, placing highest on the evaluation’s “ability to execute” axis and furthest on the “completeness of vision” axis.
7
Read the report
Prompt like a pro with Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams
Realize the full potential of your team's decision-making with prompts for Copilot in Teams. Streamline and transform your meetings so that every idea is visualized, evaluated, and brought to life.
Learn more
SOLUTIONS
Simple, smart, secure
Chat & Channels
Meetings & Events
Phone
Rooms
Previous
Next
Streamline teamwork
Bring conversations, shared content, Microsoft Loop and OneNote pages, and third-party apps together in one place.
Customize views
Find, organize, and stay on top of chats and channels with personalized views that surface what matters most.
Collaborate securely
Protect chats and channels with access controls and information protection to help keep messages, files, and shared information secure.
Increase effectiveness
Use AI-powered workflows, Microsoft 365 Copilot and third-party agents to turn conversations into valuable, shared context and action.
Enable more effective meetings
Run more effective meetings with AI-driven insights, notes, and actions from Teams Facilitator agent.
1​
Break down language barriers
Enable real-time translation and interpretation so participants can engage in the language of their choice.
1​
Enhance protection
Safeguard every Teams meeting with built-in security controls and encryption to protect confidential content and conversations.
Strengthen engagement
Host and manage professional, branded Teams events at scale.
2​
Power advanced calling
Communicate effortlessly in your flow of work and enable connectivity with external phone numbers.
3
Engage customers
Improve customer experiences with collaborative call handling and reporting in Queues app.
4
Communicate intelligently
Use Copilot and agents to bring AI to every call, boosting productivity, saving time, and improving interactions.
Simplify management
Streamline call management and enjoy peace of mind with are liable and secure cloud-based calling solution.
Coordinate with ease
Streamline desk and meeting space booking with Places finder and Copilot
5
in Microsoft calendars.
Collaborate with impact
Enable inclusive, engaging meetings for in-room and remote participants.
Boost productivity with intelligent spaces
Utilize collaborative AI and agents like Facilitator
6
for help before, during, and after meetings.
Optimize workspaces
Simplify deployment, security, and management across your workspaces and gain insights for smart planning.
Back to tabs

Individuals
Enterprise
Education

Next

Grow your customer base with communications software designed for up to 300 employees.
Learn more

Learn more

Learn more

Learn more

Add cloud-based phone service to Teams to get all the features of a landline.
Learn more

Learn more

Get extra features that help make meetings more personalized, intelligent, and protected.
Learn more

Plan events, share photos, and connect with your friends, family, and community.
Learn more
Teams (free)
Send messages, schedule calls for up to 60 minutes, and create communities for every interest.
Learn more
Microsoft 365 Family
Get Teams accounts for up to six people, plus Microsoft 365 apps and advanced security.
Learn more
Teams for enterprise
Empower your employees to get more done and transform the way they work.
Learn more
Teams Enterprise
Connect with customers by video, chat, and phone using an affordable, all-in-one solution for more than 300 people.
Learn more
Teams Premium
Grow your business with AI-powered capabilities and advanced protection for secure collaboration.
Learn more
Teams Phone
Communicate seamlessly with colleagues and customers with a reliable cloud calling service.
Learn more
Teams Rooms
Conduct meetings and facilitate inclusive collaboration and participation anywhere you work.
Learn more
Microsoft Places
Reimagine flexible work and transform spaces into engaging places using AI.
Learn more
Microsoft 365 Copilot
Boost productivity, ease collaboration, and transform the way you work with your own AI assistant.
Learn more
Teams for education
Make learning collaborative—for both students and educators.
Learn more
Office 365 Education
Students and educators at eligible institutions get Office 365 Education—including Teams—for free.
Learn more
Microsoft 365 Education
Choose from three different plans to suit your school’s needs.
Learn more

CUSTOMER STORIES

Levi Strauss & Co. simplifies work and accelerates decision-making with Microsoft Foundry
Levi Strauss & Co. builds a unified Super Agent with Microsoft Azure AI Foundry to reduce complexity, accelerate work, and deliver better fan experiences.
Products
Microsoft Foundry
GitHub Copilot
Azure Functions
Read the story
Kimley-Horn brings Microsoft 365 Copilot to AEC work
Kimley-Horn uses Microsoft 365 Copilot to reduce AEC coordination friction and deliver trusted outcomes faster.
Products
Microsoft 365
Microsoft 365 Copilot
Microsoft Teams
Read the story
Premera Blue Cross makes AI mainstream with Copilot and Copilot Studio
With IT maxed out, Premera made AI mainstream with training, guardrails, and agents—cutting a 30–45 min workflow to ~3.
Products
Microsoft 365
Microsoft Copilot Studio
Azure
Read the story
Concentrix innovates with intelligent document processing at scale using Power Platform and AI Hub
Concentrix uses Power Platform and AI Hub to process 100,000 invoices monthly with up to 99% extraction accuracy.
Products
Microsoft Power Platform
SharePoint
Microsoft Teams
Read the story
Virtua Health innovates to improve patient care using Copilot as the UI to AI
Virtua Health is transforming patient outcomes and clinician efficiency based on Copilot and Power BI dashboards, enhanced by AI analytics in Azure.
Products
Microsoft Copilot
Microsoft Copilot Studio
Power BI
Read the story
Broward County Public Schools scales Microsoft 365 Copilot in record K-12 deployment
Broward County Public Schools transformed operations with the world's largest K-12 Microsoft 365 Copilot deployment across 20,000 users.
Products
Microsoft 365 Copilot
Microsoft Copilot Studio
Reading Progress
Read the story
Back to SUCCESS STORIES section
GET STARTED
Take the next step with AI enhanced Teams - built for your work, your passions, and the ideas you’re turning into reality.
For business
Grow your customer base with communications software designed for up to 300 employees.
See plans and pricing
For individuals
Grow your business, stay organized, and collaborate with clients. Plan events, share photos, and stay close to friends and family.
Try Teams for free
For enterprise
Achieve more with Teams accounts for more than 300 people.
Get started
For education
Make learning collaborative—for both students and educators.
Learn more
[1]
AI-powered meeting features are available with Microsoft 365 Personal, Family, Premium, and Teams Premium subscriptions. Feature availability may vary by plan.
[2]
Available as an add-on license, Attendee Capacity Packs extend Teams events to support up to 100,000 attendees.
[3]
Teams Phone enables advanced call handling and connectivity with a Public Switched Telephone Network (PSTN) solution. A PSTN solution is separate from a Teams Phone license. A PSTN solution provides a customer’s tenant with phone numbers and PSTN access to domestic, international, and emergency calling.
[4]
A Teams Premium license add-on to Teams Phone is required to access the Queues app.
[5]
Intelligent AI booking features require a M365 Copilot license.
[6]
AI-powered meeting features are included in a Teams Rooms Pro licensed room. No additional Copilot license is required.
[7]
Gartner, Magic Quadrant for Unified Communications as a Service, Pankil Sheth, Megan Fernandez, Christopher Trueman, Rafael Benitez, Nitin Narang 22 September 2025.​
The report was titled as Magic Quadrant for Unified Communications as a Service, Worldwide from 2015-2022.​
​
Gartner does not endorse any vendor, product or service depicted in its research publications and does not advise technology users to select only those vendors with the highest ratings or other designation. Gartner research publications consist of the opinions of Gartner’s Research & Advisory organization and should not be construed as statements of fact. Gartner disclaims all warranties, expressed or implied, with respect to this research, including any warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.​
​
Gartner is a registered trademark and service mark and Magic Quadrant is a registered trademark of Gartner, Inc. and/or its affiliates in the U.S. and internationally and are used herein with permission. All rights reserved.​

France Aiming to Replace Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, etc.

Microsoft Teams is blocking Firefox Nightly

analysis.name: Microsoft Teams
analysis.value_proposition: Unified communication and collaboration platform combining chat, meetings, calling, and Microsoft 365 productivity with AI (Copilot) for enterprise work.
analysis.ideal_customer: Microsoft 365-committed enterprises and mid-market organizations needing integrated chat, meetings, and calling across knowledge and frontline workforces

features.name: channels
features.description: Topic-based team channels for conversations and shared content
features.evidence_quote: Bring conversations, shared content...together in one place

features.name: threads
features.evidence_quote: adding new features like threads, multiple emoji reactions

features.name: emoji reactions
features.evidence_quote: multiple emoji reactions, and emoji-triggered workflows

features.name: video conferencing
features.description: HD video meetings for teams and external participants

features.name: webinars
features.description: Webinars with attendee registration and reporting
features.evidence_quote: Webinars with attendee registration and reporting

features.name: town hall
features.description: Large-scale broadcast events for internal audiences

features.name: live events
features.description: Broadcast live events to large audiences
features.evidence_quote: What are Microsoft Teams live events?

features.description: Record meetings with transcripts and live captions
features.evidence_quote: Team meeting recordings with transcripts and live captions (English)

features.name: live transcription
features.evidence_quote: recordings with transcripts and live captions

features.name: teams phone
features.description: Cloud-based phone system with PSTN calling

features.name: contact center
features.description: Collaborative call handling for customer service

features.name: queues app
features.description: Collaborative call queue handling and reporting
features.evidence_quote: collaborative call handling and reporting in Queues app

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Share files in chats and channels via OneDrive/SharePoint

features.name: polls
features.description: Real-time polls in chats and meetings
features.evidence_quote: Real-time collaboration with file sharing, tasks, and polling

features.name: microsoft 365 copilot
features.description: AI assistant across Teams for meetings, chats, calls
features.evidence_quote: Prompt like a pro with Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams

features.name: facilitator agent
features.description: AI agent for meeting notes, insights, and follow-ups
features.evidence_quote: AI-driven insights, notes, and actions from Teams Facilitator agent

features.name: emoji-triggered workflows
features.description: Trigger automated workflows via emoji reactions

features.name: third-party agents
features.description: Support for third-party AI agents in Teams

features.name: teams rooms
features.description: Hardware and software for physical meeting rooms

features.name: microsoft places
features.evidence_quote: Streamline desk and meeting space booking with Places finder

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Marketplace of third-party apps and integrations

features.name: power platform integration
features.description: Integrate with Power Automate, Power Apps, Power BI

features.name: guest access
features.description: External users can join teams as guests
features.evidence_quote: Call and chat with users from other organizations (guest/external access)

features.name: external access
features.description: Federate with other organizations for chat and calls

features.name: data encryption
features.description: Encryption for meetings, chats, calls, and files
features.evidence_quote: Data encryption for meetings, chats, calls, and files

features.name: information protection
features.description: Access controls and DLP for messages and files

features.name: access controls
features.description: Granular access controls for channels and content
features.evidence_quote: Protect chats and channels with access controls

features.name: compliance
features.evidence_quote: Microsoft Teams app security and compliance

features.name: identity and access management
features.description: Azure AD-based identity for up to 300 users on Business
features.evidence_quote: Identity and access management for up to 300 users

features.name: cloud storage
features.evidence_quote: 10 GB of cloud storage per user

features.name: exchange email
features.description: Business-class email and calendaring via Exchange
features.evidence_quote: Exchange: Work smarter with business-class email

features.name: sharepoint
features.description: Team sites for sharing information and resources

features.name: onedrive
features.evidence_quote: OneDrive: Save, access, edit, and share files

features.name: microsoft bookings
features.evidence_quote: including Microsoft Bookings, Planner, and Forms

features.name: microsoft clipchamp
features.evidence_quote: Video editing and design tools with Microsoft Clipchamp

features.name: microsoft editor
features.evidence_quote: Microsoft Editor: Write more clearly and concisely

features.name: office web apps
features.description: Web versions of Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook
features.evidence_quote: Web and mobile versions of Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook

features.name: office desktop apps
features.description: Desktop Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook apps
features.evidence_quote: Desktop, web, and mobile versions of Word, Excel, PowerPoint

features.name: ai chat
features.description: AI chat experience with web grounding
features.evidence_quote: AI chat experience with web grounding, writing assistance

features.name: personalized views
features.description: Personalized views to organize chats and channels
features.evidence_quote: personalized views that surface what matters most

features.name: teams premium addon
features.description: Premium features add-on with advanced AI, security, and events

features.name: microsoft viva
features.evidence_quote: Microsoft Viva - Employee Experience and Engagement

features.name: branded events
features.description: Host and manage professional, branded events at scale
features.evidence_quote: Host and manage professional, branded Teams events at scale

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Native mobile apps for iOS and Android

features.name: gov cloud
features.description: GCC, GCC High, and DoD government deployments

features.name: industry solutions
features.description: Vertical solutions for healthcare, education, retail, finance, manufacturing
features.evidence_quote: Education Manufacturing Financial services Frontline solutions

differentiators: Deep integration with Microsoft 365 (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, SharePoint, OneDrive)
Microsoft 365 Copilot AI embedded across chat, meetings, and calls
All-in-one platform: chat + meetings + calling + collaboration + files
Named a Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for UCaaS seven years in a row
Enterprise-grade security, compliance, and government cloud deployments (GCC, GCC High, DoD)
Frontline worker capabilities: shift scheduling, workforce management, hot desking
Teams Rooms and certified device ecosystem for hybrid work

recent_ships.what: Threads, multiple emoji reactions, and emoji-triggered workflows
recent_ships.source: From Threads to Workflows: Microsoft Teams Features That Boost Everyone's Productivity

recent_ships.what: Teams Facilitator agent for AI-driven meeting insights, notes, and actions
recent_ships.source: AI-driven insights, notes, and actions from Teams Facilitator agent
Pride is alive: new Teams backgrounds

recent_ships.what: Named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for UCaaS (7th year)
recent_ships.source: Microsoft was named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Unified Communications as a Service

recent_ships.what: Teams 2.0 rebuilt on Edge WebView2 (dropping Electron) for reduced memory usage
recent_ships.source: Microsoft Teams 2 will use half the memory, dropping Electron for Edge Webview2

praised: Deep Microsoft 365 integration for organizations already committed to the ecosystem
Comprehensive all-in-one platform (chat + meetings + calling + files)
Enterprise-grade security and compliance for regulated industries
complaints: 'Why is Microsoft Teams still so bad?' — persistent product quality complaints (862↑ on HN)
'The Horror of Microsoft Teams' — UX/performance frustrations (544↑ on HN)
Blocks Firefox Nightly — browser compatibility issues (417↑ on HN)
Historical outages including expired certificate incidents (339↑ on HN)
Security vulnerabilities: zero-click wormable RCE (1307↑) and multiple vulnerabilities from single feature (340↑)
Memory bloat from Electron — driving Teams 2.0 rewrite on WebView2 (328↑)
Governments (France) actively seeking to replace Teams with sovereign alternatives (900↑)

free_tier.limits: Free version of Teams available (personal/basic use); business requires paid plan

tiers.name: Teams Essentials
tiers.headline_inclusions: Chat, call, video conferencing, 10 GB storage, meeting recordings with transcripts, encryption

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Essentials + web/mobile Office apps, 1 TB storage, custom email, Bookings/Planner/Forms

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Basic + desktop Office apps, webinars, Loop, Clipchamp video editing

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Business Standard plus advanced security and device management

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot Business (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI Copilot add-on layered on any business plan

pricing.notes: Business plans capped at 300 users; enterprise E1/E3/E5 SKUs and Teams Premium/Teams Phone/Teams Rooms add-ons not fully priced on this page. Annual subscription with auto-renew; separate 'no Teams' SKUs exist for EU regulatory compliance. Copilot is a $21/user/month add-on on top of any plan.
